locations_inspected.name: 8117 Preston Road
findings: Dry pipe fire protection system, 20 years old, manufactured by Reliable and reported as NFPA 13 compliant.
Six control valves were inspected and all were found in the open position; not all tamper switches were connected.
Water flow alarm and supervisory signal were tested and found operational.
Sprinkler heads were in fair visual condition with minor corrosion observed; spare heads cabinet contained an adequate supply.
Water supply was reported as static pressure 42 psi, residual pressure 49 psi, flow 1029 GPM, and supply adequate.
Overall system status was reported as PASS.
deficiencies: [Priority] Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors.
[Code] Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room.

recommendations.description: Remove combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors.
Correct exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.

overall_assessment.summary: The dry pipe fire protection system passed inspection. The system was reported as NFPA 13 compliant with adequate water supply and operational alarm devices, though not all tamper switches were connected and deficiencies were noted for storage too close to sprinkler deflectors and electrical hazards in the main electrical room.
